name: Bingocle
tagline: Trade the words before they hit the card.
description: A community bingo prediction market refereed by an AI oracle on Mantle. Predict the words a speaker will say live; an AI Validation Oracle listens, calls the bingo, and settles on-chain. Play entirely by chatting — no terminal, no seed phrase. Talk in plain language or use commands.

handles.email: (email channel is coded but not yet wired — Telegram is the live channel)

activation.telegram: Open the Bingocle bot and send /start (or just say what you want, e.g. "show my wallet").
activation.email: Email the capability address. Write commands one per line, or just describe what you want in plain English.

activationMessage: 🎲 Bingocle — predict the words a speaker will say live; an AI oracle calls the bingo on Mantle. You get an embedded testnet demo wallet (no seed phrase). Say "show my wallet" or send /start to begin. Testnet MNT only — no real funds.

commands.name: /wallet
commands.summary: Show your embedded demo wallet + balance

commands.name: /submit
commands.summary: Predict up to 3 words; first submitter founds the word

commands.name: /finalize
commands.summary: AI-curate the pool + odds and commit on-chain

commands.name: /pool
commands.summary: List curated words, odds, and current phase

commands.name: /card
commands.summary: Mint and view your 5x5 bingo card with live marks

commands.name: /price
commands.summary: Current share price of a word (moves with demand)

commands.name: /buy
commands.summary: Buy word shares on the bonding curve; price rises with demand

commands.name: /sell
commands.summary: Sell shares back before lock to realize profit/loss

commands.name: /validate
commands.summary: Run the AI oracle and commit verdicts on-chain

commands.name: /claim
commands.summary: Redeem trading payouts, bingo bonuses, and founder seeds
